sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n108179" key="u(pogeneia/zw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑπογενει-άζω</orth>, <sense id="n108179.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">entreat by touching the chin,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0026.tlg001.perseus-grc1:61" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aeschin.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.61</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
